steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content:
The diameter is $26$ centimeters, so the radius is half of that:
$$r=\frac{26}{2}=13$$

steps.title: Use cylinder volume
steps.content:
Substitute $r=13$ and $h=5$ into the cylinder volume formula:
$$V=\pi(13)^2(5)$$
$$V=\pi\cdot169\cdot5=845\pi$$
The answer is C.
